src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Replace raw text-based socket communication with object serialization using ObjectOutputStream.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: Replaced BufferedReader/DataOutputStream with ObjectOutputStream to write a Packet object.

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Change the server connection target from a specific LAN IP to localhost.
Switch from hardcoded port number to a constant defined in the Server class.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: Changed port argument from 6789 to Server.PORT.

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Adopt Java 10+ local variable type inference for cleaner code.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: Replaced explicit type declarations with 'var' for body, headers, packet, server, outStream, and writer.

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Update array declaration syntax to modern Java style.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: Changed method signature from 'String argv[]' to 'String[] args'.

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Clean up imports that are no longer used after the protocol refactor.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: Removed imports for java.io.BufferedReader, java.io.DataOutputStream, and java.io.InputStreamReader.

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Add import for ObjectOutputStream to support the new serialization logic.
Add import for HashMap to support the new header structure.
Add implicit dependency on a new Packet class for data encapsulation.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: Instantiated new Packet(headers, body) and wrote it to the stream.

src/main/java/maven/Coll.java.general_idea: Added imports for HashMap and TreeMap to support the new collection usage in the main method.
Removed the final modifier from the main method arguments, which is a cosmetic cleanup not required for compilation.
Used the var keyword for local variable type inference, a feature available since Java 10 but often adopted in newer codebases.
Added logic to populate and print TreeMap and HashMap instances, demonstrating basic collection usage.

src/main/java/maven/Command.java.general_idea: Replace the Windows-specific directory listing command with a Unix-compatible command to ensure portability across operating systems.
src/main/java/maven/Command.java.human_impl: Changed runtime.exec argument from "cmd /c dir" to "find".

src/main/java/maven/Downloader.java.general_idea: Refactor resource management to use try-with-resources for automatic closing of RandomAccessFile.
Replace explicit type declarations with the 'var' keyword for local variables.
Replace explicit type declarations with the 'var' keyword for the input stream variable.
Add explicit 'this' qualifier to field assignments to clarify scope.
Add explicit 'this' qualifier to field increment to clarify scope.
Replace custom fatal error call with standard stack trace printing.
Use URI.create().toURL() instead of new URL(String) for URL construction.

src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.general_idea: Added import for java.net.URI to support the new URL construction method.
Changed URL instantiation from direct constructor to URI.create().toURL() pattern.
Replaced explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables to modernize code style.
Renamed input stream variable from 'in' to 'reader' for clarity.
Renamed output stream variable from 'fos' to 'writer' for clarity.
Extracted buffer size magic number into a named constant for better readability.
Removed the System.out.println statement that printed a completion message.

src/main/java/maven/Main.java.general_idea: Introduce a Java record to encapsulate data, utilizing a feature available since Java 16.
Add import for HashSet to support collection usage in the main method.
Implement a method to print a 2D integer array with box-drawing characters for better readability.
Add methods to calculate maximum consecutive ones in an array, replacing the simple hello world output.
Refactor main method to instantiate the class and execute the new algorithm and visualization methods.
Use the 'var' keyword for local variable type inference, a feature introduced in Java 10.

src/test/java/maven/AppTest.java.general_idea: Removed the JUnit 5 test method and its associated imports from the test class.
src/test/java/maven/AppTest.java.human_impl: Deleted `@Test public void shouldAnswerWithTrue() { assertTrue(true); }` and related imports.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
Add Apache POI library for document processing.
Add JavaFaker library for generating fake data.
Add JUnit 3 library for testing.
Add Apache PDFBox library for PDF processing.
Add MongoDB Java Driver for database connectivity.
Add OpenCSV library for CSV processing.
Add HikariCP library for connection pooling.
Add JSch library for SSH connectivity.
Add Apache SSHD library for SSH server/client functionality.
Add Spring Web library for web application development.
Add JJWT API library for JSON Web Token handling.
Add JJWT implementation library for JSON Web Token handling.
Add JJWT Jackson library for JSON Web Token handling.
Add Lombok library for boilerplate code reduction.
Add Jedis library for Redis connectivity.
Remove JUnit 5 BOM dependency management.
Remove JUnit Jupiter API dependency.
Remove JUnit Jupiter Params dependency.
Configure Maven compiler plugin to disable annotation processing.
Remove explicit version management for standard Maven plugins.
